statements.sql: select `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` = 9 and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\User'

select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (9) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\User'
select `cooperatives`.*, (select count(*) from `venders` where `cooperatives`.`id` = `venders`.`cooperative_id`) as `farmers_count` from `cooperatives` order by `name` asc
select * from `gondal_requisitions` order by `created_at` desc limit 5
select * from `gondal_payment_batches` order by `period_end` desc limit 5
select count(*) as aggregate from `venders` where (`digital_payment_enabled` = 1 or `bank_name` is not null or `account_number` is not null)

select count(*) as aggregate from `venders` where (`digital_payment_enabled` = 1 or `bank_name` is not null or `account_number` is not null) and month(`updated_at`) = '03' and year(`updated_at`) = 2026
select count(*) as aggregate from `cooperatives` where month(`created_at`) = '03' and year(`created_at`) = 2026
select count(*) as aggregate from `gondal_requisitions` where `created_at` >= '2026-03-21 00:00:00'
select * from `users` where (`id` = 2 or `created_by` = 2) and `type` not in ('client') order by `name` asc limit 8

select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (2, 3, 4, 9, 10, 11, 13, 14) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\Models\User'

select `login_details`.`id`, `login_details`.`ip`, `login_details`.`date`, `login_details`.`Details`, `users`.`name`, `users`.`type` from `login_details` inner join `users` on `users`.`id` = `login_details`.`user_id` where (`users`.`id` = 2 or `users`.`created_by` = 2) and `users`.`type` not in ('client') order by `login_details`.`created_at` desc limit 6
select count(*) as aggregate from `gondal_requisitions` where `status` = 'pending'
select exists (select 1 from information_schema.tables where table_schema = 'erp_go' and table_name = 'languages' and table_type in ('BASE TABLE', 'SYSTEM VERSIONED')) as `exists`
select count(*) as aggregate from `ch_messages` where `to_id` = 9 and `seen` = 0
